name: MuTeLuv: Not My Father!
overview: Ployjued's bland life takes a sudden turn when Phupha, her long-time crush, invites her to join him on his dangerous mission to expose the Chantharusati Family, a strange cult gaining followers throughout their province. Her hopes of getting closer to Phupha, however, face an obstacle as her every move is watched by Wutkrai, a suspicious Chantharusati follower. Worse, "Father," the cult's prophet, seems to take a special interest in her—to a life-threatening degree.
